headline: Congressman Sells Take-Two Stock Before 'GTA VI' Release Date: Here's How Much He Made
summary: A Congressman sold Take-Two stock months before the release of "GTA VI." Here's how much he made from the trade.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Take-Two (TTWO) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Take-Two (TTWO) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Stocks Set to Open Higher as U.S.-Iran Peace Hopes Hold, PCE Inflation Data and Fed Speak Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.67%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.03% this morning as investors remained hopeful that the latest U.S. strikes on Iran would not derail talks to end the Middle East conflict.

headline: Wedbush sends bold message on Take-Two stock after earnings
summary: Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) just had the kind of post-earnings day that looks ugly on a chart but reads very differently in a research note. The stock closed down 4.42% at $227.55 on Friday, May 22, 2026, after fiscal 2027 net bookings guidance of $8.0 billion to $8.2 billion landed well below the ...
